changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Delete all existing refresh tokens before schema migration (raw values cannot be rehashed).

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Drop the old plain-text value column from the token table.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE token DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS value;

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Add value_hash (SHA-256 hex, 64 chars) and family_id (UUID) columns to the token table.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE token ADD COLUMN value_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE token ADD COLUMN family_id UUID NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Replace old value index with value_hash unique index and add composite user+family index.
